info.title: Neighborhood Intelligence API
info.description: High-performance geospatial API for neighborhood-level intelligence. Covers K-12 school search and four scored dimension groups: Vibe (privacy, walkability, visual appeal, dog friendliness, urban-rural character), Environment (acoustic comfort, air quality, industrial proximity), Demographics (health insurance coverage, ideological lean, population age profile), and Risk (flood and fire hazard).

get.description:
Returns the closest K-12 schools to the specified latitude and longitude,
ordered by distance. Results include school name, level, district,
rating (if available), and distance in miles.

Data about schools and districts is provided by Federal NCES datasets.
Sources for data ratings are provided in each school record.

parameters.name: limit_to_district

schema.title: Limit To District
schema.description: If true, limits results to schools within the same school district as the search location. If false, searches nationwide.

parameters.description: If true, limits results to schools within the same school district as the search location. If false, searches nationwide.

parameters.name: level

schema.title: Level
schema.description: Optional filter for school level. Valid values: 'elementary', 'middle', 'high'. You can include multiple levels separated by commas (e.g. 'elementary,middle'). If not specified, schools of all levels will be included.

parameters.description: Optional filter for school level. Valid values: 'elementary', 'middle', 'high'. You can include multiple levels separated by commas (e.g. 'elementary,middle'). If not specified, schools of all levels will be included.

parameters.name: limit

schema.title: Limit
schema.description: The maximum number of closest schools to return (defaults to 10, maximum 50).

parameters.description: The maximum number of closest schools to return (defaults to 10, maximum 50).

parameters.name: lat

schema.title: Lat
schema.description: The latitude of the search location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

parameters.description: The latitude of the search location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

parameters.name: lon

schema.title: Lon
schema.description: The longitude of the search location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -180 and 180.

parameters.description: The longitude of the search location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -180 and 180.

get.description:
Returns the names and metadata of all school districts (Unified, Elementary,
Secondary) that geographically overlap with the specified latitude and
longitude. School district boundaries can overlap (e.g., an elementary
district within a high school district).

This data is provided by Federal NCES datasets.

schema.description: Latitude of the search location (WGS 84).

parameters.description: Latitude of the search location (WGS 84).

parameters.name: lon

schema.title: Lon
schema.description: Longitude of the search location (WGS 84).

parameters.description: Longitude of the search location (WGS 84).

Evaluates how secluded and private a neighborhood feels based on
housing density, lot sizes, tree cover, and street-level visibility.
Scores range from 1 (High Density) to 255 (Estate Sprawl).

get.description:
Classifies the built environment from dense urban core to open countryside
using overhead imagery analysis. Scores range from 1 (dense urban core -
wall-to-wall pavement, no greenery) to 255 (rural — farms, forests, barely
a building). A score of 0 indicates no data is available for the location.

parameters.name: lat

schema.title: Lat
schema.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

parameters.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

parameters.name: lon

schema.title: Lon
schema.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -180 and 180.

parameters.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -180 and 180.

get.description:
Quantifies acoustic comfort using federal noise modelling data for road,
railroad, and aviation sources. The score is a serenity scale: 1 is the
worst (extreme noise — immediate proximity to an airport runway or heavy
rail) and 255 is the best (serene — nature sounds only). A score of 0
indicates no noise data is available, which typically implies a rural or
very secluded location. The response includes the composite score and a
human-readable breakdown of individual noise sources in decibels.

schema.title: Lat
schema.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

schema.title: Lon
schema.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -180 and 180.

parameters.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -180 and 180.

get.description:
A composite metric combining overhead imagery analysis, EPA hazard data
(including Superfund sites), and nearby business and industry POI density.
Scores range from 1 (hazardous — active industrial sites or severe pollution
indicators nearby) to 255 (exclusively residential — no warehouses,
industrial facilities, or hazard sites detected). A score of 0 means no
data is available for the location.

get.description:
Derived from OpenAQ monitoring station data. Scores range from 1
(consistently dangerous AQI readings — serious health risk for all
residents) to 255 (consistently clean air with little to no health
concern). A score of 0 means no monitoring data is available for the
location.

get.description:
Sourced from the most recent US Census Bureau data. Measures the share of
residents with any form of health insurance on a linear 0-255 scale. A score
of 0 means no data is available or the local population count falls below the
reporting threshold. A score of 1 represents near-zero coverage; 255 represents
over 90% of residents insured.

get.description:
Derived from US Census Bureau data and voting records. The score runs
from 1 (predominantly conservative) through 128 (evenly split) to 255
(predominantly liberal). A score of 0 means no data is available for
the location.

schema.title: Lat
schema.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

parameters.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

get.description:
Derived from the most recent US Census Bureau data. Scores range from
1 (predominantly young adults aged 20-34, few children or seniors) to
255 (predominantly senior, strong 65+ population and high median age).
128 represents a balanced age mix across young adults, families, and
older residents. A score of 0 means no data is available.

get.description:
Derived from FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer (NFHL) designations. Scores
range from 1 (highest risk — coastal high-hazard zone subject to wave action,
FEMA V/VE; typically associated with elevated insurance costs) through
moderate undetermined-risk and 500-year floodplain zones, to 255 (minimal
flood hazard, FEMA Zone C). A score of 0 means no FEMA data is available.

schema.title: Lat
schema.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

parameters.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -90 and 90.

parameters.name: lon

schema.title: Lon
schema.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -180 and 180.

parameters.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees (WGS 84). Must be between -180 and 180.

get.description:
Derived from CALFIRE State Responsibility Area (SRA) hazard severity zone
designations. Currently available for California only. Scores range from 1
(Severe — extreme fire hazard requiring maximum protection measures) through
High and Moderate zones to 255 (no fire risk factors reported by CALFIRE).
A score of 0 means no CALFIRE data is available, including all locations
outside California.

get.description:
Converts an address into geographic coordinates. This endpoint takes a free-text
location or address and returns the most likely latitude and longitude. It is designed
specifically for Agentic usage where only a single definitive location is needed.

To increase location accuracy, it is highly encouraged to provide as precise and
complete an address as possible. Providing an optional two-letter country code 
(e.g., "us") is also strongly encouraged to increase accuracy. Returns null
coordinates and an explanatory message if no results are found.

parameters.name: query

schema.title: Query
schema.description: The address or location query to geocode. e.g., '1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington, DC'

parameters.description: The address or location query to geocode. e.g., '1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington, DC'

parameters.name: country

schema.title: Country
schema.description: Optional two-letter country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) to improve geocoding accuracy.

parameters.description: Optional two-letter country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) to improve geocoding accuracy.

result.description: The Air Quality result. A score of 0 means no OpenAQ monitoring data is available for the given coordinates.

AirQualityResponse.title: AirQualityResponse
AirQualityResponse.description: API response for an Air Quality lookup.

result.description: Good: mostly clean air with rare elevated readings from seasonal wildfire smoke.

score.title: Score
score.description: Air Quality score (0-255). Derived from OpenAQ monitoring data. Reflects the consistency and severity of AQI readings at the location. 1 represents consistently dangerous air quality posing serious health risks; 255 represents consistently clean air with little to no health concern. 0 means no monitoring data is available.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

AirQualityResult.title: AirQualityResult
AirQualityResult.description: Air Quality score for a location.

examples.description: Good: mostly clean air with rare elevated readings from seasonal wildfire smoke.

DistrictResult.title: DistrictResult
DistrictResult.description: Model representing a school district search result.

districts.title: Districts
districts.description: List of school districts found at the location.

additional_info.title: Additional Info
additional_info.description: Any additional information or disclaimers about the search results.

DistrictSearchResponse.title: DistrictSearchResponse
DistrictSearchResponse.description: API response model for school district search results.

result.description: The Dog Friendliness result. A score of 0 means no data is available.

DogFriendlinessResponse.title: DogFriendlinessResponse
DogFriendlinessResponse.description: API response for a Dog Friendliness lookup.

result.description: Excellent for dogs: two off-leash parks within half a mile, wide sidewalks, and multiple pet-friendly businesses nearby.

score.title: Score
score.description: Dog Friendliness score (0-255). Evaluates how suitable a neighborhood is for dog owners based on proximity to parks and trails, off-leash areas, pet-friendly businesses, sidewalk availability, and open green spaces. Higher is more dog-friendly.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

DogFriendlinessResult.title: DogFriendlinessResult
DogFriendlinessResult.description: Dog Friendliness score for a location.

examples.description: Excellent for dogs: two off-leash parks within half a mile, wide sidewalks, and multiple pet-friendly businesses nearby.

result.description: The Fire Risk result. A score of 0 means no CALFIRE data is available, including all locations outside California.

FireRiskResponse.title: FireRiskResponse
FireRiskResponse.description: API response for a Fire Risk lookup.

result.description: Low. Little to no fire hazard; no additional measures required.

score.title: Score
score.description: Fire Risk score (0-255). Derived from CALFIRE State Responsibility Area (SRA) hazard severity zone designations. Currently available for California only. Lower scores indicate higher risk: 1 represents Severe hazard zones requiring maximum protection measures; 255 represents areas with no fire risk factors reported. 0 means no CALFIRE data is available (including all non-California locations).

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

FireRiskResult.title: FireRiskResult
FireRiskResult.description: Fire Risk score for a location.

examples.description: Low. Little to no fire hazard; no additional measures required.

result.description: The Flood Risk result. A score of 0 means no FEMA flood zone data is available for the given coordinates.

FloodRiskResponse.title: FloodRiskResponse
FloodRiskResponse.description: API response for a Flood Risk lookup.

result.description: Low-moderate risk: within the 500-year floodplain (FEMA X/B). Some residual flood risk.

score.title: Score
score.description: Flood Risk score (0-255). Derived from FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer (NFHL) designations. Lower scores indicate higher flood risk and likely elevated insurance costs: 1 represents coastal high-hazard zones (FEMA V/VE) subject to wave action; 255 represents areas with minimal to no flood hazard (FEMA Zone C). 0 means no FEMA data is available for the location.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

FloodRiskResult.title: FloodRiskResult
FloodRiskResult.description: Flood Risk score for a location.

examples.description: Low-moderate risk: within the 500-year floodplain (FEMA X/B). Some residual flood risk.

lat.title: Lat
lat.description: Latitude of the location. Null if no results found.

lon.title: Lon
lon.description: Longitude of the location. Null if no results found.

message.title: Message
message.description: Additional information, such as error messages if no results were found.

result.description: The Ideological Lean result. A score of 0 means no Census or voting data is available for the given coordinates.

IdeologicalLeanResponse.title: IdeologicalLeanResponse
IdeologicalLeanResponse.description: API response for an Ideological Lean lookup.

result.description: Largely liberal: liberal majority with a modest opposing presence.

score.title: Score
score.description: Ideological Lean score (0-255). Derived from US Census Bureau data and voting records. Scores toward 1 indicate a predominantly conservative area; scores toward 255 indicate a predominantly liberal area; 128 represents an even split. 0 means no data is available.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

IdeologicalLeanResult.title: IdeologicalLeanResult
IdeologicalLeanResult.description: Ideological Lean score for a location.

examples.description: Largely liberal: liberal majority with a modest opposing presence.

result.description: The Industrial Proximity result. A score of 0 means no imagery, hazard, or POI data is available for the given coordinates.

IndustrialProximityResponse.title: IndustrialProximityResponse
IndustrialProximityResponse.description: API response for an Industrial Proximity lookup.

result.description: Mostly residential: occasional light commercial; no significant industrial presence detected.

score.title: Score
score.description: Industrial Proximity score (0-255). A composite metric combining overhead imagery analysis, EPA hazard data (including Superfund sites), and nearby business/POI density. Lower scores indicate proximity to hazardous or heavy industrial activity; higher scores indicate a purely residential environment. 0 means no data available.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

IndustrialProximityResult.title: IndustrialProximityResult
IndustrialProximityResult.description: Industrial Proximity score for a location.

examples.description: Mostly residential: occasional light commercial; no significant industrial presence detected.

result.description: The Health Insurance Coverage result. A score of 0 means no Census data is available or the local population falls below the reporting threshold.

InsuranceCoverageResponse.title: InsuranceCoverageResponse
InsuranceCoverageResponse.description: API response for a Health Insurance Coverage lookup.

result.description: High. Around 81% of residents have health insurance.

score.title: Score
score.description: Health Insurance Coverage score (0-255). Linear scale derived from US Census Bureau data measuring the share of residents with any form of health insurance. 0 means no data available; 1 represents near-zero coverage; 255 represents over 90% of residents insured. Each point corresponds to roughly 0.35 percentage points of coverage.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

InsuranceCoverageResult.title: InsuranceCoverageResult
InsuranceCoverageResult.description: Health Insurance Coverage score for a location.

examples.description: High. Around 81% of residents have health insurance.

result.description: The Noise Levels result. A score of 0 means no noise data is available (typically a rural or unpopulated location).

NoiseLevelsResponse.title: NoiseLevelsResponse
NoiseLevelsResponse.description: API response for a Noise Levels lookup.

result.description: Noise level: 61dB (Road: 58dB, Aviation: 42dB)

score.title: Score
score.description: Noise Levels score (0-255). Quantifies acoustic comfort using federal noise modelling data covering road, railroad, and aviation sources. Higher values indicate quieter surroundings; lower values indicate louder ambient noise. A score of 0 means no noise data is available, typically implying a rural or very secluded location.

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable noise breakdown showing the total decibel level and per-source contributions (Road, Railroad, Aviation) where data is available. Example: 'Noise level: 65dB (Road: 52dB, Railroad: 48dB)'.

NoiseLevelsResult.title: NoiseLevelsResult
NoiseLevelsResult.description: Noise Levels score and breakdown for a location.

result.description: The Population Age Profile result. A score of 0 means no Census data is available for the given coordinates.

PopulationProfileResponse.title: PopulationProfileResponse
PopulationProfileResponse.description: API response for a Population Age Profile lookup.

result.description: Mixed: balanced spread of young adults, families, and older residents.

score.title: Score
score.description: Population Age Profile score (0-255). Derived from the most recent US Census Bureau data. Lower scores indicate a younger-skewing area dominated by young adults (20-34); higher scores indicate a senior-skewing area with a strong 65+ population and high median age. 128 represents a balanced age mix. 0 means no data is available.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

PopulationProfileResult.title: PopulationProfileResult
PopulationProfileResult.description: Population Age Profile score for a location.

examples.description: Mixed: balanced spread of young adults, families, and older residents.

result.description: The Privacy Index result. A score of 0 means no data is available.

PrivacyResponse.title: PrivacyResponse
PrivacyResponse.description: API response for a Privacy Index lookup.

result.description: High privacy: large lot sizes, mature tree canopy, and generous street setbacks limit visibility from passing traffic.

score.title: Score
score.description: Privacy Index score (0-255). Measures how secluded and private a neighborhood feels based on housing density, lot sizes, tree cover, and street-level visibility. Higher is more private.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

PrivacyResult.title: PrivacyResult
PrivacyResult.description: Privacy Index score for a location.

examples.description: High privacy: large lot sizes, mature tree canopy, and generous street setbacks limit visibility from passing traffic.

nces_id.title: Nces Id
nces_id.description: The unique 12-digit National Center for Education Statistics (NCES) identifier for the school.

lea_id.title: Lea Id
lea_id.description: The NCES Local Education Agency (LEA) identifier, identifying the school district.

name.title: Name
name.description: The official name of the school institution.

lea_name.title: Lea Name
lea_name.description: The name of the school district or Local Education Agency (LEA).

address.title: Address
address.description: The full physical address of the school, including street, city, state, and zip code.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: The primary contact phone number for the school.

website.title: Website
website.description: The URL of the official school website.

level.title: Level
level.description: The educational level(s) served by the school (e.g. 'Elementary', 'Middle', 'High').

lowest_grade.title: Lowest Grade
lowest_grade.description: The lowest grade level served by the school. Values: -1=Pre-Kindergarten (PK), 0=Kindergarten (KG), 1-12=Grades 1-12, 13=Ungraded (UG), 14=Adult Education (AE).

highest_grade.title: Highest Grade
highest_grade.description: The highest grade level served by the school. Values: -1=Pre-Kindergarten (PK), 0=Kindergarten (KG), 1-12=Grades 1-12, 13=Ungraded (UG), 14=Adult Education (AE).

total_students.title: Total Students
total_students.description: The total number of students enrolled at the school.

total_teachers.title: Total Teachers
total_teachers.description: The total number of full-time equivalent (FTE) teachers at the school.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: An overall rating for the school on a scale of 1 to 10, where 10 represents the highest quality.

rating_source.title: Rating Source
rating_source.description: The source of the school's overall rating. This could be an identifier for the organization or system that provided the rating. Use for citations and attributions.

lat.title: Lat
lat.description: The latitude of the school's location in decimal degrees (WGS 84).

lon.title: Lon
lon.description: The longitude of the school's location in decimal degrees (WGS 84).

distance_meters.title: Distance Meters
distance_meters.description: The distance in meters from the search query coordinates to the school location.

SchoolResult.title: SchoolResult
SchoolResult.description: Model representing a school search result.

schools.title: Schools
schools.description: A list of found schools, sorted by proximity to the search location (closest first).

data_source.title: Data Source
data_source.description: The authoritative source dataset for the school information.

data_vintage.title: Data Vintage
data_vintage.description: The calendar year of the dataset used for these results.

additional_info.title: Additional Info
additional_info.description: Any additional information or disclaimers about the search results.

SchoolSearchResponse.title: SchoolSearchResponse
SchoolSearchResponse.description: API response model for school search results.

description.description: A short human-readable narrative explaining the score and the key factors that influenced it at this location.

BearerAuth.description: Firebase ID token or Apigee-issued OAuth 2.0 access token. Pass as ``Authorization: Bearer <token>``.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-iHuus-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Apigee API key issued via the iHuus developer portal. Pass as the ``X-iHuus-API-Key`` request header.

tags.name: Schools & Ratings
tags.description: Search for K-12 schools by geographic coordinates or street address. Results include distance, school level, district information, demographics, and performance metrics where available.

tags.name: Vibe
tags.description: Neighborhood vibe dimension scores. Each endpoint returns a 0-255 score for a single dimension (privacy, walkability, visual appeal, dog friendliness, urban-rural character) along with a semantic description.

tags.name: Environment
tags.description: Environment dimension scores (0-255). Includes composite noise levels, air quality, and other environmental factors accompanied by detailed source breakdowns.

tags.name: Demographics
tags.description: Demographic dimension scores (0-255) derived from US Census Bureau data. Includes health insurance coverage and other population-level indicators.

tags.name: Risk
tags.description: Risk dimension scores (0-255). Covers natural hazard exposure including flood and fire risk, derived from FEMA and other authoritative hazard datasets. Lower scores indicate higher risk.

tags.name: Tools
tags.description: Auxiliary tools for processing data and agent assistance, such as geocoding addresses into geospatial coordinates.
